structured.name: Get All DisplayMessages
structured.objective: Enable a CSO to retrieve all messages currently configured in a Charging Station.
structured.description:
This use case describes how a CSO can request all the installed DisplayMessages configured via
OCPP in a Charging Station.
The Charging Station can remove messages when they are out-dated, or transactions have ended.
It can be very useful for a CSO to be able to view to current list of messages, so the CSO knows
which messages are (still) configured.
scenario: 1. The CSO asks the CSMS to retrieve all messages.
2. The CSMS sends a GetDisplayMessagesRequest message to the Charging Station.

3. The Charging Station responds with a GetDisplayMessagesResponse Accepted, indicating it
has configured messages and will send them.

4. The Charging Station sends one or more NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest messages to the
CSMS (depending on the amount of messages to be sent).
5. The CSMS responds to every notify with a NotifyDisplayMessagesResponse message.
structured.prerequisites: There is at least one message configured in the Charging Station
structured.remarks: Only messages configured via OCPP can be retrieved via a GetDisplayMessagesRequest.

requirements.precondition:
When all fields except requestId in a
GetDisplayMessagesRequest are omitted AND
at least one display message is configured.
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL respond with Accepted.

The Charging Station SHALL send all configured
DisplayMessages via NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest.

requirements.precondition:
O03.FR.02
AND
There are more DisplayMessages than the
Charging Station can send in 1
NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL split the DisplayMessages over
multiple NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest messages.

The Charging Station SHALL set the tbc field is true in every
NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest messages, except the last.

The Charging Station SHALL set the requestId field to the same
value as the requestId in the GetDisplayMessagesRequest.
The Charging Station SHALL respond with Unknown.

chunks.content:
# O03 - Get All DisplayMessages

**Objective:** Enable a CSO to retrieve all messages currently configured in a Charging Station.

**Description:** This use case describes how a CSO can request all the installed DisplayMessages configured via
OCPP in a Charging Station.
The Charging Station can remove messages when they are out-dated, or transactions have ended.
It can be very useful for a CSO to be able to view to current list of messages, so the CSO knows
which messages are (still) configured.

**Actors:** CSO, CSMS, Charging Station

**Scenario:**
1. The CSO asks the CSMS to retrieve all messages.
2. The CSMS sends a GetDisplayMessagesRequest message to the Charging Station.
3. The Charging Station responds with a GetDisplayMessagesResponse Accepted, indicating it
has configured messages and will send them.
4. The Charging Station sends one or more NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest messages to the
CSMS (depending on the amount of messages to be sent).
5. The CSMS responds to every notify with a NotifyDisplayMessagesResponse message.

**Prerequisites:** There is at least one message configured in the Charging Station

**Postconditions:** n/a

**Remarks:** Only messages configured via OCPP can be retrieved via a GetDisplayMessagesRequest.

# O03 - Requirements

**O03.FR.01**
Precondition: When all fields except requestId in a
GetDisplayMessagesRequest are omitted AND
at least one display message is configured.
The Charging Station SHALL respond with Accepted.

**O03.FR.02**
Precondition: O03.FR.01
The Charging Station SHALL send all configured
DisplayMessages via NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest.

**O03.FR.03**
Precondition: O03.FR.02
AND
There are more DisplayMessages than the
Charging Station can send in 1
NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest
The Charging Station SHALL split the DisplayMessages over
multiple NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest messages.

**O03.FR.04**
Precondition: O03.FR.03
The Charging Station SHALL set the tbc field is true in every
NotifyDisplayMessagesRequest messages, except the last.

**O03.FR.05**
Precondition: O03.FR.04
The Charging Station SHALL set the requestId field to the same
value as the requestId in the GetDisplayMessagesRequest.

**O03.FR.06**
Precondition: When NO DisplayMessages are configured
The Charging Station SHALL respond with Unknown.
